title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers video presents five techniques for reducing AI hallucinations and token waste in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise structured queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails via Python code hooks, and runtime steering for self-correction. Demonstrations use Strands Agents framework and Amazon Bedrock AgentCore at scale.
